title: virtual parameterizable interface reported as never assigned any actual interface

features.name: parameterized virtual interface in class
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member that uses type parameters

features.name: parameterized interface with generic ports
features.description: Code should include an interface declared with generic type parameters

features.name: virtual interface constructor assignment
features.description: Code should include a class constructor that assigns a virtual interface passed as parameter
